title: Quantum Information & Entanglement Shadow Analysis

decay_envelope.description: C(ρ(t)) → 0 at finite t*: concurrence vanishes in finite time
decay_envelope.why: C(ρ(t)) = max(0, λ₁-λ₂-λ₃-λ₄): power-law decay to threshold = EML-2

esd.note: The SUDDEN DEATH (vanishing in finite time) is EML-∞, but shadow = EML-2

coherent_information.why: S(ρ) = -Tr(ρ log ρ): von Neumann entropy = EML-2

hashing_bound.why: Maximum over EML-2 coherent information = EML-2

superactivation.why: Superactivation involves PPPT channels (positive partial transpose): entanglement structure with complex phases in tensor product. The superactivated capacity uses entangled inputs with exp(i·) phases = EML-3

anyon_braiding.description: Topological phases: anyons with braiding matrix B = exp(iθ_B)
anyon_braiding.why: Braiding phase θ_B: exp(iθ_B) = complex unitary = EML-3

toric_code.description: Toric code: star/plaquette operators, logical qubits via Z₂ homology
toric_code.why: Topological logical operators: non-local loops with ℤ₂ winding = EML-3

hawking_radiation.why: T_H = ℏκ/2πk: surface gravity κ with 2π factor → exp(2πiω/κ) near horizon = EML-3

page_curve.description: S(R(t)): entanglement entropy of Hawking radiation = Page curve
page_curve.why: Islands formula: S = min_I(Area(∂I)/4G_N + S_bulk) involves complex saddles = EML-3

replica_wormhole.description: Z_n = Σ_topologies exp(-S_gravity): replica wormhole geometry
replica_wormhole.why: Sum over topologies with complex phases = EML-3

complexity_growth.description: C(t) ~ t for t < t_scrambling, C ~ exp(S) at max
complexity_growth.why: Linear growth then plateau: EML-2 (linear = exp(log t) structure)

entanglement_hamiltonian.why: -log ρ_A has eigenvalues ε_i = -log λ_i; spectrum matches boundary CFT = EML-3

li_haldane.description: Entanglement spectrum ~ edge CFT spectrum: Li-Haldane conjecture

key_theorem: The Quantum Information Shadow Rule (S268): Quantum EML-∞ objects split by whether they involve topological/holographic structure: EML-2 shadow (real/thermodynamic):   ESD (exp(-γt) real decay), channel capacity (von Neumann entropy),   complexity growth (linear volume). EML-3 shadow (topological/holographic):   Topological QEC (anyon braiding = exp(iθ_B)),   Black hole information (replica wormholes with complex phases),   Entanglement spectrum (matching CFT with complex Virasoro structure),   Superactivation (entangled inputs with complex phases). THE RULE: standard quantum channels → EML-2; topology/holography → EML-3. Holographic shadow is always EML-3: AdS/CFT maps bulk geometry (measurement/EML-2) to boundary CFT (oscillation/EML-3). The black hole information paradox shadow = EML-3 because the resolution (islands, replica wormholes) requires complex topological saddles.
rabbit_hole_log: BH information: shadow=EML-3 (replica wormholes, islands = complex saddles)
Standard quantum channels → EML-2; topology/holography → EML-3
Superactivation exception: Q(N₁⊗N₂)>0 requires EML-3 entangled inputs
